hero.title: Impara meglio con MirrorBuddy
hero.subtitle: Il tuo compagno di studio basato su intelligenza artificiale

intent.greeting: Hi! What shall we do today?
intent.greetingNamed: Hi {name}! What shall we do today?
intent.question: Pick where to start: I'll guide you.
intent.lockedHint: Ask a grown-up to unlock it
intent.subjectSubtitle: Pick a subject and I'll bring the right professor.

homework.title: Do my homework
homework.subtitle: I'll help you step by step
homework.contextMessage: Hi! I need help with my homework. Tell me what you need, and feel free to use photos, PDFs or formulas.
homework.subjectTitle: What do you need help with?

study.title: Study
study.subtitle: Let's make a map together
study.subjectTitle: What do you want to study?
study.contextMessage: I want to study this topic. Help me with a mind map, then a summary, and finally some flashcards to review.

quizMe.title: Test yourself
quizMe.subtitle: I'll ask the questions
quizMe.subjectTitle: What should I quiz you on?
quizMe.contextMessage: I want to be quizzed on this topic. Prepare a quiz and let’s use flashcards to practice.

intent.subjectAny: I don't know / A bit of everything

lockedDialog.title: Ask a grown-up to unlock it
lockedDialog.body: This activity has a lock on it. Call mum, dad or your teacher: they can open it for you!
